castVote(uint256,uint256,uint256[],bytes.details: Single transaction replaces up to 7 separate vote() calls.

candidateCount().notice: Returns candidate count for the current election

castVote(uint256,uint256,uint256[],bytes.notice: Vote for President (0 = abstain), Secretary (0 = abstain),         and up to 5 General Members (at least 2 female).

getCandidate(uint256).notice: Backward-compat: returns candidate for the current election

getHistoricalCandidate(uint256,uint256).notice: Returns candidate from any election (preserves historical data)

verifyRegCode(string,string,bytes32[]).notice: Verify a registration code (student_id + code) against the on-chain Merkle root.
